Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout




{theme.map(theme => { return(
< div className="box" id = {theme.id}> Theme Name : {theme.Name}
Theme Price : {theme.Price}
Theme Details : {theme.Description}
< Link to = "/editTheme" className="link"> Edit < Link to = "/editTheme" className="link"> Delete

) })}
